name: Chocolate Surprise Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Butter and flour a 12-cup Bundt pan.
3. In a small mixing bowl, beat cream cheese and sugar until smooth using an electric mixer.
4. Add egg and vanilla; beat until blended. Set aside.
5. Prepare the chocolate cake mix according to package instructions and fold in semisweet chocolate morsels.
6. Pour the chocolate batter into the prepared pan and evenly cover with the cream cheese mixture.
7. Bake for 45 to 55 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Let cool on a wire rack for 25 minutes.
9. Remove from the pan and let cool completely.
10. Dust with confectioners' sugar. Serve with whipped cream and raspberries if desired.
Serves 12
